title: Yume 3
description: Exploration based modpack which rewards the player for discovering new biomes and items - Fabric 1.20.1
body:
![YUM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/235c9e266954772b5abd32a7d99c635092cb7cb1.png)
# 
A magic driven modpack focused around color and exploration. Take pictues, savor the moment, then use that moment as power. Get bored of colors then make a clone or set up your very own computer. There are endless possibilities (which makes sense, you are playing minecraft after all). Pick your Origin or have it picked for you, experience the world with unique abilities and attributes with a copious amount of origins, you and all your friends can be a unique band of adventurers.

There is somthing for everyone to enjoy from, adventureing, cooking, magic, rituals and building with an assortment of new bloocks ranging from woods, stones, plants, wool, lanterns and varietys of glass blocks to spicy up your builds.
# Features
-  **Clones** - The ability to clone yourself and escape death
-  **Story Driven Magic** - The Spectrem mod adds a full story and a bunch of magical items  to go with it 
- **Witchcraft** - from curses to flying brooms bewitchment adds in familars, protective salts, summon circles, and unqiue potoin brewing.
- **Species** - Every player is a different species thanks to the origins mod. This gives every player a special powers and weaknesses.
- **Computers** - using lua you can program a fully working computer
- **Exploration** - mods like artifacts, spectrem and Better End reward the player for finding new locations
- **Cooking** - Makes sandwiches to fried chicken
- **Seasons** - changing seasons to give a sense of time to the game
